Ten Rooms, One Togetherness

Rooms built for however long you need to stay

Six Double Rooms and four Family Rooms, each with private en-suite bathroom, flat-screen TV, and fresh linen on arrival.

Double Room

Queen bed, wall-mounted TV, en-suite bathroom. Our most-booked room for short and overnight stays.

Garden-View Double

Natural light, garden outlook, quiet corner of the property — ideal for longer rests.

Family Room

Extra space, security-barred windows, TV — built for families and longer-term guests.

About Kopano

Kopano means togetherness

Kopano B&B sits on a quiet, tree-lined stand in Ferndale, Randburg — close enough to the N1 and William Nicol Drive to reach anywhere in Johannesburg within minutes, yet private enough to feel like a break from the city. Ten rooms, one gate, one welcome.
